name: Cj's Favorite Lime Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Light or regular sour cream
1 cup Light or regular sour cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the graham cracker crumbs, 2 tablespoons sugar, and butter. Press over the bottom and 1/2 inch up the sides of a 9-inch cheesecake pan with removable rim.
2. Bake in a 350-degree oven until lightly browned, about 10 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese, sour cream, eggs, remaining sugar, lime peel, juice, and flour until smooth.
4. Pour the mixture into the crust.
5. Bake in a 350-degree oven until the center jiggles only slightly when gently shaken, about 35 to 45 minutes.
6. Cool. Spread with topping.
7. Cover and chill until cold, at least 4 hours or up to the next day.
8. Top with lime slices and enjoy.
Topping:
Mix 1 cup light or regular sour cream and 2 teaspoons each sugar and lime juice.
